---
name: Bug report
about: Report a problem with a skill, script, or documentation page
title: "[Bug]: "
labels: bug
assignees: ""
---

## Problem

Describe the issue clearly.

## Affected area

- [ ] Skill
- [ ] Script
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Template
- [ ] Other

## File or skill name

Example: `skills/project-discovery/SKILL.md`

## Expected behavior

What should happen instead?

## Suggested fix

If you have an idea, describe it here.

## Additional context

Add screenshots, examples, or links if useful.
